section_name: Trooper Billy Jack Zachary Memorial Highway
text:
(a) The portion of Interstate Highway 20 in Ward County between mile marker 80 and mile marker 82 is designated as the Trooper Billy Jack Zachary Memorial Highway. The designation is in addition to any other designation.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

(1) design and construct markers indicating the highway number, the designation as the Trooper Billy Jack Zachary Memorial Highway, and any other appropriate information; and

(2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.123 (Rosa Parks Memorial Parkway) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001(52), eff. September 1, 2019.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.140 — Trooper Billy Jack Zachary Memorial Highway

(a) The portion of Interstate Highway 20 in Ward County between mile marker 80 and mile marker 82 is designated as the Trooper Billy Jack Zachary Memorial Highway. The designation is in addition to any other designation.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

    (1) design and construct markers indicating the highway number, the designation as the Trooper Billy Jack Zachary Memorial Highway, and any other appropriate information; and

    (2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.123 (Rosa Parks Memorial Parkway) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001(52), eff. September 1, 2019.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 375 (H.B.3917), Sec. 1, eff. June 1, 2017.*
